title: Result - Hong-kong
content:
Welcome to Hong Kong, the Pearl of the Orient, where tradition meets modernity. Cantonese is the main language, but English is widely spoken and an official language.
Renowned for its free trade economy with low taxes, Hong Kong is a global trading hub. Nature lovers can explore hiking trails and beaches just minutes from the bustling city, while theme parks like Ocean Park and Hong Kong Disneyland add to the excitement. Discover its cultural roots at Wong Tai Sin Temple or vibrant markets like Temple Street and Ladies' Market. Foodies will love Hong Kong’s mix of global cuisine and local favorites like dim sum, egg tarts and milk tea.

## Unique food tradition
Siu Mei (roast goose): crispy skin and tender meat served with rice or noodles.
Hong Kong is a major global financial hub, with international companies and businesses setting up regional offices there.

### Local legend or myth
Tin Hau: the sea goddess, who protects fishermen and sailors. She was a young girl with visions of storms and the power to save lives at sea. Temples in her honor are found throughout the region.

### Language of the Land
Chinese (Cantonese) and English are both official languages, with the latter being widely used in the Government and by the legal and business sectors.
skyscrapers, each at least 150 meters high, make Hong Kong the world leader in skyscrapers.
